title: Cloudinary Cleanup
subtitle: Compare the database with Cloudinary and remove orphaned images

analysis.title: Orphaned Image Detector
analysis.description: Scans all images in Cloudinary and compares them against every image reference in the database. Images not referenced in any table are marked as orphaned and can be safely deleted.
analysis.noOrphans: No orphaned images found. Cloudinary is clean!
analysis.confirmDelete: Delete {count} orphaned images from Cloudinary? This action cannot be undone.

schedule.title: Automatic Cleanup
schedule.description: Cleanup runs automatically every night at 3:00 AM UTC, comparing Cloudinary against the production database.
schedule.setupNote: To enable: configure Heroku Scheduler with the command node scripts/cleanup.js every 24 hours.

pdf.title: Orphaned PDF Detector
pdf.description: Scans all PDFs in Cloudinary and compares them against every PDF reference in the database.
pdf.noOrphans: No orphaned PDFs found. Cloudinary is clean!
pdf.confirmDelete: Delete {count} orphaned PDFs from Cloudinary? This action cannot be undone.
